motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def solveEquation(self, equation: str) -> str:
    coefficients = equation.split('=')[0].split()
    variables = equation.split('=')[1].split()
    
    for i in range(len(coefficients)):
        coefficients[i] = int(coefficients[i])
        variables[i] = int(variables[i])
    
    sign = 1
    for i in range(len(coefficients)):
        if coefficients[i] < 0:
            sign *= -1
            coefficients[i] *= -1
            variables[i] *= -1
    
    x = 0
    for i in range(len(variables)):
        x += coefficients[i] * variables[i]
        x *= sign
    
    if x == 0:
        return "No solution"
    elif x > 0:
        return f"x={x}"
    else:
        return f"x=-{x}"

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
